equivalence_argument: The compact codec mirrors the current alloy TxAsyncCommitment fields, but the current consensus transaction type and codec do not contain program_counter or caller_address, so the Atlas-required full payload is not round-tripped.

checked_queries: async commitment codec preserves all fields
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: TxAsyncCommitment compact encoding cannot preserve program_counter or caller_address because those fields are absent from the current transaction type and codec.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/storage/codecs/src/alloy/transaction/async_commitment.rs copies gas, gas_price, to, value, origin_tx, precompile fields, ttl, executor_address, commitment_validator, origin_tx_rlp, and input.
ritual-alloy-internal/crates/consensus/src/transaction/async_commitment.rs defines the current transaction with origin_tx_rlp and validator fields but no program_counter or caller_address fields.

notes: Confirmed gap relative to the Atlas statement; the current type schema has been narrowed.
rationale: The new compact helper is explicitly documented as a 1:1 mirror of alloy_consensus::transaction::TxAsyncCommitment and copies every field in both serialization directions. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Compact encoding for TxAsyncCommitment must round-trip the full async commitment payload, including gas fields, original transaction data, precompile fields, commit/TTL blocks, executor and validator addresses, program_counter, caller_address, and input bytes.
suggested_falsification_tests: Generate TxAsyncCommitment values with distinct program_counter, caller_address, orig_tx_rlp, precompile_input, and input values; compact-encode and decode them and assert every field equals the original.
summary: Async commitment compact encoding lacks program_counter and caller_address preservation.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Attempt to construct a TxAsyncCommitment with distinct program_counter and caller_address and round-trip through the compact codec; current types have no fields to encode or assert.
title: Async commitment codec preserves all fields
